caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 23 kt winds with 4.5 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while St. Maarten has 21 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the ENE, affecting marine activities in both the Western and Eastern Caribbean, particularly at ports like Roatan and St. Maarten.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 24 kt winds with 6.6 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Marseille has 21 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with the Northern swell direction dominating the Eastern Mediterranean, particularly affecting Mykonos.
